summary: Tests cover main requirements (parsing, classification, reporting, workflow validation) but miss alternative formats (requirements.txt) and edge cases (empty deps, malformed inputs, null fields). Rigor is adequate for happy path but insufficient for boundary conditions. Design is readable and well-organized but brittle in places (regex extraction, policy duplication, no temp directory cleanup, act tests sequential). Would catch basic regressions but miss important edge cases and has some maintenance issues.
